name: stackra/telemetry
purpose: Cross-cutting telemetry seam — provides the shared PII redactor and telemetry contracts every observability + integration consumer plugs into.
when_to_use: A module emits telemetry payloads (metrics, traces, translation source strings) that must pass through a shared redactor before hitting a third party.
when_not_to_use: For structured user-facing activity or compliance-grade audit trails, use stackra/activity or stackra/audit.
